{props.isLoading ? (
  <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4">
    {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (
      <div
        key={`skel-${i}`}
        className="h-40 animate-pulse rounded-xl border border-border bg-muted/30"
      />
    ))}
  </div>
) : props.vendors.length === 0 ? (
  <div className="rounded-xl border border-dashed border-border p-10 text-center">
    <p className="font-medium text-foreground">No vendors yet</p>
    <p className="mt-1 text-muted-foreground text-sm">
      Be the first to sell in this marketplace.
    </p>
  </div>
) : (
  <div className="space-y-6">
    <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4">
      {props.vendors.map((vendor) => (
        <a
          key={vendor.id}
          href={`/vendors/${vendor.slug}`}
          className="group flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card p-4 transition-all hover:border-foreground/20 hover:shadow-sm"
        >
          {vendor.logo ? (
            <div className="flex h-16 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-lg bg-muted">
              <img
                src={vendor.logo}
                alt={vendor.name}
                className="h-full w-full object-contain p-1"
              />
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="flex h-16 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-muted">
              <span className="font-bold text-2xl text-muted-foreground/50">
                {vendor.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
              </span>
            </div>
          )}
          <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
            <p className="truncate font-medium text-foreground text-sm group-hover:text-primary">
              {vendor.name}
            </p>
            {(vendor.city || vendor.country) && (
              <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-muted-foreground text-xs">
                {[vendor.city, vendor.state, vendor.country]
                  .filter(Boolean)
                  .join(", ")}
              </p>
            )}
            {vendor.description && (
              <p className="mt-1 line-clamp-2 text-muted-foreground text-xs">
                {vendor.description}
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
        </a>
      ))}
    </div>

    {/* Pagination */}
    {(props.page > 1 || props.hasMore) && (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
        <button
          type="button"
          disabled={props.page <= 1}
          onClick={props.onPrevPage}
          className="rounded-lg border border-border px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-colors hover:bg-muted disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
        >
          Previous
        </button>
        <span className="text-muted-foreground text-sm">Page {props.page}</span>
        <button
          type="button"
          disabled={!props.hasMore}
          onClick={props.onNextPage}
          className="rounded-lg border border-border px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-colors hover:bg-muted disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
        >
          Next
        </button>
      </div>
    )}
  </div>
)}
